title: Unable to see the critical path
excerpt: I know critical path from the Gantt chart is on beta phase. However, when working on that I found that is not possible to see the critical path for only one group, If that group have items with dependencies in other grou…

posts.author: NatachaB (Natacha Barrantes)
posts.cookedHtml: I know critical path from the Gantt chart is on beta phase. However, when working on that I found that is not possible to see the critical path for only one group, If that group have items with dependencies in other groups. That is a limitation according with Monday’s support team. However, that limitation looks illogical.
